claim_title: Five SDC rate files are triplicated across three directories

results.description: Verify all five rate CSVs exist in all three cited locations.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
files = [
    "adjustment_factors_by_county.csv",
    "base_population_by_county.csv",
    "fertility_rates_by_county.csv",
    "migration_rates_by_county.csv",
    "survival_rates_by_county.csv",
]
locations = [
    Path("sdc_2024_replication/data"),
    Path("sdc_2024_replication/data_updated"),
    Path("data/processed/immigration/rates"),
]
triplicated = 0
for name in files:
    flags = [int((loc / name).exists()) for loc in locations]
    print(f"{name}::" + "".join(str(x) for x in flags))
    if all(flags):
        triplicated += 1
print(f"TRIPLICATED_FILE_COUNT={triplicated}")
if triplicated == 5:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
results.stdout:
adjustment_factors_by_county.csv::111
base_population_by_county.csv::111
fertility_rates_by_county.csv::111
migration_rates_by_county.csv::111
survival_rates_by_county.csv::111
TRIPLICATED_FILE_COUNT=5
ASSERTION=PASS
